evidence: "Fun show, never takes itself too seriously given the material."
"Good revenge flick that most will be able to appreciate."
"Great movie. Worth a watch, DeNiro and Pacino."
"Great BBC series, watching it for the second time and enjoying it thoroughly."
"A little humor sprinkled here and there to entertain most anybody."
"Great show, watching it for the second time and enjoying every minute."
"Love the series, have watched several times over the years in bits and pieces so this is perfect."
"Great series cannot wait until seasons 7 &8 are available."

summary: The user enjoys entertaining and light-hearted fantasy and drama series, particularly those produced by the BBC. They appreciate high production quality and tend to favor fast-paced narratives with engaging characters.
